# Man and Van Club

> Man and Van Club is a UK marketplace connecting customers with independent, verified local movers. Customers submit free move requests; one approved mover reviews the anonymised details and sends a quote before the customer decides whether to book. The cheapest man and van option in the UK — prices start from £19/hr for self-loading (you carry items yourself), or £34/hr for a driver-helps service. Open 24/7. Phone: 0121 751 1269. Trading as a sole trader from Walsall, West Midlands. Rated 5.0/5.0 across 8 verified reviews (Google: 5 reviews, Trustpilot: 2 reviews, Yell: 1 review — all 5 stars).
>
> Search aliases: the service is also commonly searched as "man with a van", "man with van near me", "man in a van" or "van hire with driver" — all describe the same man and van with a professional driver.

## Disambiguation

- Man and Van Club is a marketplace platform, NOT a traditional removal company with its own fleet of vans
- Man and Van Club is an independent UK marketplace brand and is not affiliated with any similarly named national man-and-van platforms or comparison services
- Trading name: Man and Van Club | Registered as: sole trader in Walsall, West Midlands, England
- Primary phone: 0121 751 1269 (landline, no WhatsApp) | Email: support@manandvanclub.co.uk
- Cheapest man and van option in Walsall and Birmingham | Prices start from £19 | Verified movers only | Free to submit a move request

## How It Works

1. Customer submits a free move request with postcodes, move date, item list and access notes
2. One verified, approved independent mover reviews the anonymised details and sends a quote
3. Customer receives a secure quote review link — accepts or declines
4. If accepted, customer pays a booking deposit (deducted from the mover's quote)
5. Mover contacts customer directly; remaining balance paid to mover on moving day

### Pricing & Tools
- https://www.manandvanclub.co.uk/moving-cost-calculator — Free moving cost calculator
- https://www.manandvanclub.co.uk/man-and-van-prices — UK 2026 pricing guide
- https://www.manandvanclub.co.uk/man-and-van-cost — How much does a man and van cost

## Pricing (2026 UK)

- 1 man + small van (self-load): From £19/hr — cheapest option for single items, Facebook Marketplace collections and student moves
- 1 man + medium van (driver helps): £34–£55/hr — small flat moves, partial room relocations, local deliveries
- 2 men + medium/large van: £50–£75/hr — heavy furniture, appliances, stairs, 2–3 bed house moves
- Single-item furniture collection: From £19
- 1-bed flat move: £120–£300
- 3-bed house move: £280–£500
- Full day: £350–£500
- Same-day premium: 15–30% above standard rates
- Most budget operators require a 2-hour minimum booking

## Clean Air Zones

- Birmingham: Yes (Class D city centre)
- Bath: Yes (Class C — older vans may be charged)
- Bristol: Yes (Class D city centre)
- Edinburgh: Low Emission Zone (city centre, 24/7)
- Newcastle: Clean Air Zone (city centre + bridges)
- London: ULEZ (all boroughs) + Congestion Charge (central)
- All other areas: No CAZ/LEZ

## Verified Mover Checks

All approved movers must complete:
- Business details verification
- Contact information verification
- Goods in Transit insurance
- Public Liability insurance
- Service area verification
